/usr/bin/ar qc libOPNMIDI.a CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/opnmidi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/opnmidi_load.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/opnmidi_midiplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_generic.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_freq_opn2.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_freq_opna.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_dmx.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_apogee.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/models/model_w9x.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mame_opn2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mame/mame_ym2612fm.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked_opn2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/nuked/ym3438.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/np2_opna.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/np2/fmgen_opna.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/np2/fmgen_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/np2/fmgen_fmgen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/np2/fmgen_fmtimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/np2/fmgen_psg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mame_opna.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mamefm/fm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mamefm/ymdeltat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mamefm/emu2149.c.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/mamefm/resampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm_opn2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm_opna.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_opn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_misc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_pcm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_adpcm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OPNMIDI_static.dir/src/chips/ymfm/ymfm_ssg.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libOPNMIDI.a
